messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- AOS: growth archetype
- SBAC: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: A. O. Smith (NYSE: AOS) director receives 2,296 deferred RSUs - Stock Titan
    Summary: A. O. Smith (NYSE: AOS) director receives 2,296 deferred RSUs Stock Titan

[1] Title: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript - Insider Monkey
    Summary: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript Insider Monkey

[2] Title: SBA Communications CFO takes investor-stage slot at J.P. Morgan conference - Stock Titan
    Summary: SBA Communications CFO takes investor-stage slot at J.P. Morgan conference Stock Titan

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Director RSU grants are low-information corporate governance items that don't impact investment thesis."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["AOS"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Q1 2026 earnings call transcripts contain detailed performance discussion and guidance relevant to assessing the growth archetype position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "CFO conference speaking slots are routine corporate events with no substantive impact on SBAC's growth prospects."
  }
]
```
